introSection: This article is for the only known roller coaster at Asian Paradise in Daxi, Taoyuan, Taiwan. It opened on 5 July 1980 and was the first roller coaster in Taiwan with a double corkscrew. It was demolished with the park at some point prior to 2010.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: This roller coaster had a very gentle first drop which began straight before turning 180 degrees into the double corskcrew element.

fullText:
This article is for the only known roller coaster at Asian Paradise in Daxi, Taoyuan, Taiwan. It opened on 5 July 1980 and was the first roller coaster in Taiwan with a double corkscrew. It was demolished with the park at some point prior to 2010.

This roller coaster had a very gentle first drop which began straight before turning 180 degrees into the double corskcrew element.
